---
title: Weekly quizzes
---


```{r}
#| label: load_packages
#| include: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#| cache: false
library(tidyverse)
options(knitr.kable.NA = '')
source(here::here("course_info.R"))
```

For weeks 2--11, there will be a short Moodle quiz conducted during the seminar. The best 8 of the 10 quizzes will count towards your final mark. Each quiz is worth 1% of your final mark, for a total of 8% overall. 

```{r}
#| label: table
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
schedule |>
  filter(!is.na(Quiz)) |>
  transmute(
    Date = paste0("<span style='white-space:nowrap;'>", format(Date+1, "%d %b"), "</span>"),
    Topic = Topic,
    Quiz = glue::glue("[<span style='white-space:nowrap;'>{Quiz}</span>]({QMoodle})"),
  ) |>
  knitr::kable(format = "markdown")
```
